{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = The Horseman
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Horseman]] gathers energy systems from world to world and replicates their effects.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
